text: Stepping through the bright hallway into this research and development space, I feel a curious mix of excitement and contemplation. The glass walls and vivid colors evoke the sense of a boundary between the familiar and the experimental. My mind awakens to questions about innovation, human curiosity, and the ways we try to connect with emerging ideas. It feels like a threshold—one that urges me to linger and reflect on what lies beyond, both physically and conceptually.
